title: Larry Hunter
compiled_truth: Larry Hunter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-11), Larry Hunter sent 85 and received 869 emails, totalling 954 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (39), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (36), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (14), [Stephanie Panus](people/stephanie-panus) (10), [Kevin Meredith](people/kevin-meredith) (10).
